sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO I_INFORMATION_SEND_T (informationid,receiveid,topflag,hideflag,followflag, validflag,addoperator,addtime,memo,specialid,pizhuid,ytpizhuid) VALUES ($informationid$,$receiveid$,$topflag$,$hideflag$,$followflag$, 1,'$addoperator$','$addtime$','$memo$',0,0,0) SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(a.ID) FROM I_INFORMATION_SEND_T a LEFT JOIN I_INFORMATION_T b on a.informationid = b.id WHERE a.VALIDFLAG > 0
a.receiveid = $receiveid$
a.addtime >= '$starttime$'
'$endtime$' >= a.addtime
a.tuihuitime > '$tuihuistarttime$'
'$tuihuiendtime$' >= a.tuihuitime
(b.infotitle like '%$infotitle$%')
(b.infocontent like '%$infocontent$%')
b.departmentid = $departmentid$
b.infostate = '$infostate$'
b.urgentflag = '$urgentflag$'
b.infosource = '$infosource$'
b.infotype = '$infotype$'
a.specialid = $specialid$
b.gatherid = $gatherid$
b.annotationid = $annotationid$
a.validflag >= $validflag$
$validflag2$ > a.validflag
a.followflag = $followflag$

SELECT a.*,b.infoid,b.infooperate,b.infotitle,b.infocontent,b.submitunit,b.submitunitid,b.otherunitids,b.otherunit, b.infosource,b.infotype,b.infostate,b.urgentflag,b.isclear,b.pointaddress1,b.pointaddress2,b.reviewer,b.issuer,b.attachments, b.gatherid,b.annotationid,b.departmentid,c.departname,d.departname as receivename,g.specialName, CONCAT(e.addtime,' ',e.content) as gongzuopizhu,CONCAT(f.addtime,' ',f.content) as yuantoupizhu FROM I_INFORMATION_SEND_T a LEFT JOIN I_INFORMATION_T b on a.informationid = b.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t c on b.departmentid = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t d on a.receiveid = d.id left join i_information_annotation_t e on a.pizhuid = e.id left join i_information_annotation_t f on a.ytpizhuid = f.id left join i_information_special_t g on a.specialid = g.id WHERE a.VALIDFLAG > 0
a.receiveid = $receiveid$
a.addtime >= '$starttime$'
'$endtime$' >= a.addtime
a.tuihuitime > '$tuihuistarttime$'
'$tuihuiendtime$' >= a.tuihuitime
(b.infotitle like '%$infotitle$%')
(b.infocontent like '%$infocontent$%')
b.departmentid = $departmentid$
b.infostate = '$infostate$'
b.urgentflag = '$urgentflag$'
b.infosource = '$infosource$'
b.infotype = '$infotype$'
a.specialid = $specialid$
b.gatherid = $gatherid$
b.annotationid = $annotationid$
a.validflag >= $validflag$
$validflag2$ > a.validflag
a.followflag = $followflag$
order by a.topflag desc,a.id desc

SELECT a.*,b.infoid,b.infooperate,b.infotitle,b.infocontent,b.submitunit,b.submitunitid,b.otherunitids,b.otherunit, b.infosource,b.infotype,b.infostate,b.urgentflag,b.isclear,b.pointaddress1,b.pointaddress2,b.pointaddress3,b.reviewer,b.issuer,b.attachments, b.gatherid,b.annotationid,b.departmentid,c.departname FROM I_INFORMATION_SEND_T a LEFT JOIN I_INFORMATION_T b on a.informationid = b.id LEFT JOIN sys_department_t c on b.departmentid = c.id WHERE a.VALIDFLAG > 0 and a.id = $id$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE I_INFORMATION_SEND_T SET VALIDFLAG = 0 WHERE id = $id$
UPDATE I_INFORMATION_SEND_T SET pizhuid = $pizhuid$ where id = $id$
UPDATE I_INFORMATION_SEND_T SET ytpizhuid = $ytpizhuid$ where id = $id$
UPDATE I_INFORMATION_SEND_T SET topflag = $topflag$ where id=$id$
UPDATE I_INFORMATION_SEND_T SET hideflag = $hideflag$ where id=$id$
UPDATE I_INFORMATION_SEND_T SET followflag = $followflag$ where id=$id$

UPDATE I_INFORMATION_SEND_T SET validflag = $validflag$
tuihuireason = '$tuihuireason$'
tuihuitime = '$tuihuitime$'
signoper = '$signoper$'
signoperid = $signoperid$
signtime = '$signtime$'
feedbackoper = '$feedbackoper$'
feedbackoperid = $feedbackoperid$
feedbacktime = '$feedbacktime$'
feedbackcontent = '$feedbackcontent$'
where id=$id$
UPDATE I_INFORMATION_SEND_T SET specialid = $specialid$ where id = $id$
sqlMap.select: select a.informationid,c.departname as receivename from I_INFORMATION_SEND_T a left join sys_department_t c on a.receiveid = c.id where informationid = $informationid$

SELECT COUNT(a.ID) FROM I_INFORMATION_SEND_T a LEFT JOIN I_INFORMATION_T b on a.informationid = b.id WHERE a.VALIDFLAG > 0
a.addtime >= '$starttime$'
'$endtime$' >= a.addtime
a.validflag = '$validflag$'
